chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI High Court Appeal No. 45 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Hearing Case (Priority) 1. For orders on CMA No. 405/2026 (Urgent) 2. For orders on office objection a/w reply at A 3. For hearing of main case 4. For hearing of CMA No. 770/2023 13.04.2026 Mr. Imtiaz Shah Advocate for the Appellant M/s. Ghulam Hussain and Sami-ur-Rehman Advocates for the Respondent No.7 Mr. Khalid Javed Rana, DAG Ms. Saima Imdad, Assistant Advocate General Sindh.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2-4. Learned counsel for the Appellant under instructions does not press this appeal and submits that the cause has become infructuous. Learned counsel for the Respondents as well as learned DAG have no objection. Accordingly, appeal is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad PS
